VGBND.SpellPromptBody:
This character is a spellcaster. Would you like to pick spells from the compendium?
Provisional — spell export from the Vagabond app is not yet supported by the API.
VGBND.SpellNote: Select the spells your character knows. Spell export from the Vagabond app is not yet available in the API.
VGBND.SpellPackMissing: Could not find the vagabond.spells compendium pack.
VGBND.UnresolvedSearch: These items had no exact compendium match. Search for them below, or create a blank item to fill in manually.
VGBND.CreatedItem: Blank item "{name}" created — fill it in manually.
VGBND.ErrorLoginMissing: Please enter your email and password.
VGBND.NoCharacters: No characters found in your account.
VGBND.NoGroups: You are not a member of any groups.
VGBND.NoGroupChars: No characters found for this group's members.
VGBND.SelectGroup: Select a group on the left to view its characters.
VGBND.ErrorCORSFallback: Direct fetch blocked — opening in a new tab. Copy the JSON and use Import by UUID if needed.
